calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

David L. Fiol, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yolanda Ramirez, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the Maria Rodriguez, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Maria M. Lampasona, Esq. appeared for defendant American Medical Response Ambulance Service, Inc.
Order appointing Yolanda Ramirez Guardian ad Litem for Maria Rodriguez was filed March 7, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $92,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $33,312.73.
Medical Bills & Liens - $25,696.13.
Costs - $2,061.81.

The net balance of $30,929.33 shall be deposited into the Bank of America account jointly maintained by Petitioner Yolanda Ramirez and Claimant Maria Rodriguez. Petitioner shall act as fiduciary and use the funds solely for the benefit of Claimant.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
